bizUrls.title: Yelp Business URLs
bizUrls.description: List of Yelp business page URLs (e.g. https://www.yelp.com/biz/warm-stone-spa-playa-del-rey)

geoCode.title: Geo code
geoCode.description: Scrape.do geoCode (e.g. 'us'). Leave empty for default.

delayBetweenRequestsMs.title: Delay between requests (ms)
delayBetweenRequestsMs.description: Pause between biz URL fetches to avoid hammering scrape.do.
